summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of NEW Fahrzeugsuche page. All 24 tests passed: page renders with correct title, API source selector works (mobile.de active, others disabled with 'Bald' badge), search input filters by brand/model/location/dealer, all 4 filter dropdowns work (brand, price, year, km), clear filters button appears and resets correctly, 12 listing cards render with vehicle images/prices/details, deal badges show green (good deal) or red (above market) comparison, star/track button toggles tracked state, tracking tab shows count and only tracked vehicles, empty tracking state shows appropriate message, tab switching works, filter panel toggle works, sidebar Beispiele badge shows '7', no regression on existing pages.
passed_tests: Page title 'Fahrzeugsuche' renders correctly (data-testid='fahrzeugsuche-title') - PASS
API source selector visible (data-testid='api-source-selector') - PASS
mobile.de is active and highlighted with cyan (#00E5FF) - PASS
AutoScout24 shows 'Bald' badge (disabled) - PASS
eBay Kleinanzeigen shows 'Bald' badge (disabled) - PASS
heycar shows 'Bald' badge (disabled) - PASS
Search input visible (data-testid='vehicle-search') - PASS
Search filters by brand - 'BMW' returns 3 results - PASS
Search filters by location - 'München' returns 2 results - PASS
Filter panel visible by default (data-testid='filter-panel') - PASS
Brand filter dropdown works (data-testid='filter-brand') - PASS
Price filter dropdown works (data-testid='filter-price') - PASS
Year filter dropdown works (data-testid='filter-year') - PASS
Km filter dropdown works (data-testid='filter-km') - PASS
Clear filters button appears when filters active (data-testid='clear-filters') - PASS
Clear filters resets to all 12 listings - PASS
Price filter €50.000+ returns 4 vehicles correctly - PASS
12 listing cards render in default view - PASS
Listing cards ML-001, ML-006, ML-012 all present - PASS
Deal badges with 'vs. Markt' comparison present - PASS
Green deal badges (good deals) present - PASS
Track button toggles tracked state (data-testid='track-btn-ML-001') - PASS
Tracking count updates to 1 after tracking first vehicle - PASS
Tracking count updates to 2 after tracking second vehicle - PASS
Tracking tab shows only tracked vehicles (data-testid='tab-tracked') - PASS
Untracking removes vehicle from tracking tab - PASS
Search tab shows all 12 listings (data-testid='tab-search') - PASS
Empty tracking state shows 'Noch keine Fahrzeuge im Tracking' message - PASS
Toggle filters button hides filter panel (data-testid='toggle-filters-btn') - PASS
Toggle filters button shows filter panel again - PASS
Sidebar Beispiele badge shows '7' - PASS
Fahrzeugsuche link highlighted as active in sidebar - PASS
All 7 Beispiele links present in sidebar - PASS
Dashboard overview still works (no regression) - PASS
Fahrzeug-Vergleich page still works (no regression) - PASS
Deal Analyzer tool still works (no regression) - PASS
Direct URL navigation to /dashboard/beispiele/fahrzeugsuche works - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: BeispielFahrzeugsuche.jsx correctly implements all required features with proper data-testid attributes
12 mock vehicle listings with complete data (brand, model, year, km, price, marketPrice, location, dealer, image)
Search filtering works across brand+model+location+dealer text fields
Filter dropdowns properly filter by brand, price range, year range, and km range
Tracking state managed with useState Set for efficient add/remove operations
DealBadge component correctly calculates and displays price vs market comparison
AnimatePresence used for smooth filter panel show/hide animation
DashboardSidebar.jsx correctly includes Fahrzeugsuche in beispielNav array (7 items total)
DashboardPage.jsx correctly routes /beispiele/fahrzeugsuche to BeispielFahrzeugsuche component
All API data is MOCKED - no real mobile.de API connection
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required, all data is mocked
seed_data_creation: N/A - all vehicle listing data is hardcoded in BeispielFahrzeugsuche.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fahrzeugsuche page fully implemented and tested. Features: API source selector (mobile.de active, others disabled), search input filtering, 4 filter dropdowns (brand/price/year/km), 12 mock vehicle listings with deal badges, track/untrack functionality with tracking tab, filter panel toggle. All routes under /dashboard/beispiele/fahrzeugsuche. Beispiele menu now has 7 items. All data is MOCKED/static in component file. No real mobile.de API integration.
mocked_api_note: All vehicle listing data is hardcoded in BeispielFahrzeugsuche.jsx. No real mobile.de API connection - this is intentional per requirements.
